overview: Longevity Integrative Wellness Center provides regenerative medicine using platelet-rich plasma (PRP), consultative medicine, and anti-aging care with a personalized approach to health evaluation. Care focuses on proactive functional lifestyle medicine addressing root causes and includes hormone evaluation.
highlights: Platelet-rich plasma (PRP) therapy for pain and tissue regeneration
targetAudience: Adults seeking proactive, personalized anti-aging and functional medicine focused on optimizing health and quality of life.
